codeReview.summary: Pass. Current HEAD satisfies the feature contract: the compare suite no longer uses timeout padding, compare coverage is isolated by provider stubs, onchain unknown-network routes now reject before triggering live catalog work, and current-head route tests explicitly prove live-expanded onchain network/dex/pool catalog behavior plus seeded fallback behavior. The handoff commit itself is still a verification/artifact commit rather than the implementation commit, but the feature description explicitly targeted scrutiny of current HEAD rather than attribution to an older misattributed commit, and the present code/tests now provide that proof on HEAD.

sharedStateObservations.observation: This fix feature was handed off with a `commitId` that points to a verification/artifact commit instead of the code-bearing commits it reviewed. That did not block this review because the feature's purpose was to prove current-HEAD behavior, but it shows the mission still allows verification-only handoffs to blur commit attribution.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff `/home/whoami/.factory/missions/f3507a1f-9e14-4c7c-a7d4-636d4909f2b3/handoffs/2026-03-27T04-42-12-079Z__prove-live-onchain-pool-catalog-without-timeout-masking__ea179996-cce5-453c-9387-957fee35a418.json` records `commitId` `d16f2c497024ca6a29b0835f30eab5e1d4ce55f1`, while `git show --stat d16f2c4` contains only scrutiny artifacts and the actual relevant code/test commits are `3aebd7e`, `d8800eb`, and later `727cb6b`.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the prior failed report, the feature transcript skeleton, the worker handoff, the current HEAD test/code state, and the referenced commits. Current HEAD now proves the feature directly: `tests/compare-coingecko.test.ts` has no remaining `15000` timeout override and stubs DeFiLlama fetches, `src/modules/onchain.ts` short-circuits unknown-network routes before live catalog work, and `tests/app.test.ts` includes explicit current-head proof of live-expanded onchain catalog behavior and seeded fallback coverage.
